meaning: n.(神话中的)蜥蜴状妖怪,蛇怪 一种老式火炮
examples: I am the founder of Basilisk Games and the lead developer, programmer and artist on the Eschalon series.
Did you know? Basilisk lizards are excellent swimmers and are capable of remaining underwater for up to 30 minutes.
Swimmers push against the water's surface not unlike South American basilisk lizards, which can scamper on top of water by slapping their big feet against the surface.
